database.name: your_database_name

database.domain: your business domain (e.g. e-commerce, fintech, SaaS)
database.core_workflow: Describe the main workflow: Entity A → Event B → Outcome C

Users.description: Authenticated platform users. Each user belongs to an organization.

columns.user_id: FK to Users — who placed the order

common_queries: SELECT * FROM Orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

common_analytics.name: Recent records
common_analytics.description: Latest rows in the main table
common_analytics.sql: SELECT * FROM your_main_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

common_analytics.name: Row counts by category
common_analytics.sql: SELECT category_col, COUNT(*) as count FROM your_table GROUP BY category_col ORDER BY count DESC
